## 🛠 Type of Change
Select the applicable options:
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI/CD or Packaging/Environment updates

## 🧼 Checklist
Before submitting this PR, please confirm the following:
- [ ] All the tests have been passed.
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas (like ctypes/DLL memory pointers).
- [ ] I understand that this branch should be **Squashed and Merged** into `main` to preserve a clean history.
- [ ] If applicable, I have updated the version string/classifiers in `pyproject.toml`.
